steps.title: Find the linear rule
steps.content:
Using the table points $(3,9)$ and $(5,11)$, the slope is
$$\frac{11-9}{5-3}=1$$
So the relationship has the form $p=c+b$.

steps.title: Match the equation form
steps.content:
Rewrite $p=c+6$ by subtracting $p$ from both sides.
$$c-p=-6$$
The answer is A.
